channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Did Anthropic talk its way into an AI export ban?

item.title: ‘Money can make you happy’: My wife and I have no heirs, but we’re making the world a better place by giving it away
